{{Quote|The Drall Patriots don't seem to have any connections with the Chirq Council, though they were definitely hatching some future terrorist activities.|[[Lilith Laughlin]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TCCSC" />}}
The '''Drall Patriots''' were a group of [[Drall/Legends|Drall]] extremists fighting for the independence of [[Drall (planet)|Drall]] from the [[Diktat|unified government]] of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
{{Quote|Down below, do you see that bunker? Some Drall terrorists are using it as they plan their future crimes.|[[Dayana]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:GIotDP">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Gather Intel on the Drall Patriots|Corellia}}</ref>}}
The Drall Patriots were a small, unorganized military group forced to follow [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] laws without implementing their own. Finally, the Drall government could take it no longer. They secretly started to train [[Troop/Legends|troops]] and send them to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] to fight CorSec and its ally, the [[Federation of the Double Worlds|Fed-Dub]]. The patriot troops were no match for CorSec. It was not until the [[Selonian Separatists]] provided aid that they had a chance.

The Drall Patriots were present on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. They were based in a [[Drall Patriot's Cave|cave]] in the [[Agrilat Region|Agrilat Swamp]].<ref name="SWG:DPC" /> They also owned a [[Drall Patriot Warehouse|warehouse]] on the outskirts of the city of [[Doaba Guerfel/Legends|Doaba Guerfel]].<ref name="SWG:TCCSC" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] agent working for [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Vitala Baize]] investigated the Doaba Guerfel warehouse because the informant [[Lilith Laughlin]] mentioned possible connections between the Drall Patriots and a criminal organization known as the [[Chirq Council]]. The agent assaulted the bunker and killed several Drall Patriot tacticians. Although it was discovered that the Patriots were hatching some future terrorist activities, no evidence of connections with the Chirq Council was found.<ref name="SWG:TCCSC" /> In the meantime, the [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] peacekeeper [[Dayana]] was also investigating the warehouse. The Selonian tasked a spacer to infiltrate the bunker in order to discover what the Drall Patriots were planning. The spacer downloaded information from their data terminals and Dayana was then able to prevent the Drall Patriots future attack.<ref name="SWG:GIotDP" />
